subject: GRB 150114C#: Planned XMM-Newton observation
body:
XMM-Newton will observe GRB 150114C at location

RA=03h 38m 01.6s, DEC=-26d 56' 48", J2000

starting at 04:45 UT, on January 15, 2019,
for an exposure of 55000 seconds.




This message is intended only for the recipient(s) named above. It may contain proprietary information and/or
protected content. Any unauthorised disclosure, use, retention or dissemination is prohibited. If you have received
this e-mail in error, please notify the sender immediately. ESA applies appropriate organisational measures to protect
personal data, in case of data privacy queries, please contact the ESA Data Protection Officer (dpo@esa.int).
